title: WolfHsmError::Wh{code:-2000} abused as generic invalid-arg sentinel
description: key.rs line 40 and cryptocb.rs line 59 synthesize WolfHsmError::Wh{code:-2000} for Rust-side conditions (data too large, already registered) that have nothing to do with wolfHSM. -2000 is WH_ERROR_BASE; callers matching on Wh{code} cannot distinguish a real server error from a Rust argument validation failure. This establishes a copy-me pattern: the next contributor adds a validation check using the same idiom. A distinct variant is needed before this pattern spreads.
